summary: Iteration 4 backend testing complete. 47/47 pytest tests pass (39 baseline + 8 new). Verified cookie-based auth (HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Lax on hanta_admin_session), backwards-compat Bearer auth, /api/auth/logout cookie clearing, cookie-only access to /api/auth/me and /api/admin/*, and scraper refactor regression (run_scrape_job + _entry_to_item still inserts/processes RSS entries via /api/admin/refresh-now).

minor.issue: Set-Cookie attributes are correct (HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Lax; Path=/), but no CSRF token is returned for cookie-only flow. Cookie-auth + non-mutating GETs are safe; for cross-origin POST/PATCH/DELETE relying on the cookie alone, consider double-submit CSRF or restrict cookie auth to same-site frontend only.

Endpoint is unauthenticated (no Depends(get_current_admin)). Functionally fine since logout just clears a cookie, but documenting/locking it down would be cleaner. Currently anyone hitting POST /api/auth/logout always returns 200.
secure=True hardcoded - works for the HTTPS preview URL, but local dev over http://localhost will silently fail to set the cookie in browsers. Consider deriving from env (e.g., COOKIE_SECURE).
Same as iter-3: BackgroundTasks default None misleading; not blocking.

action_items: Optional: parameterize cookie 'secure' flag via env so local dev (http) is supported.
Optional: Add CSRF mitigation or restrict cookie usage to same-site requests if any cross-origin admin POSTs will rely on cookie-only auth.
Optional: Require admin auth on /api/auth/logout (or document it as intentionally public).
critical_code_review_comments: auth.get_current_admin correctly prefers cookie over Bearer header. oauth2_scheme is set with auto_error=False so missing Authorization header does not 401 prematurely - good.
server.py login_form / login_json now accept Response and call set_session_cookie - clean. /api/auth/logout exists and calls clear_session_cookie. No public API contract changes.

scrapers._entry_to_item refactor: collect_hanta_items still produces the same shape consumed by run_scrape_job (verified via /api/admin/refresh-now -> /api/admin/scrape-runs). All required keys (feeds_checked, items_matched, inserted, duplicates) present.
Tests previously used hardcoded ADMIN_PASSWORD. Now read from env / fallback to /app/backend/.env -- improvement.
secure=True is hardcoded in set_session_cookie -- fine for prod/preview (HTTPS) but breaks local http dev cookie persistence.
logout endpoint is public; minor hardening opportunity.
server.py is still 594 lines -- close to split threshold. Consider routes/admin.py + routes/public.py + routes/auth.py for next iteration.
seed_data_creation: None new. Argentina (AR) outbreak still has confirmed_cases=999, deaths=50 (carried over from prior PATCH). Scraper inserted 0 items (duplicates expected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 47/47 green. Two new test classes added for iteration 4: TestCookieAuth (7 tests covering Set-Cookie attributes, cookie-only /me, bearer-only /me, cookie-only admin route, logout clearing + 401 after logout, pristine 401) and TestScraperRefactorRegression (1 test verifying /admin/refresh-now -> scrape-runs still produces required fields after _entry_to_item extraction). Verified Set-Cookie raw header contains HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Lax. Cookie name = 'hanta_admin_session'. Logout uses delete_cookie which emits Set-Cookie with empty value + past Expires. mocked: revenue analytics in /api/admin/analytics is still simulated. Resend API key still invalid by design - test asserts graceful {ok:false}.
rca of the issue: No bugs - all green. Iteration 4 refactor (cookie auth alongside Bearer, scrapers helper extraction, env-driven test creds) verified non-regressive.
